title: Shinji Ikari has a rack apparently
display_title: Shinji Ikari has a rack apparently
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Ikari has a rack, apparently.             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 02, 2010 11:57 am Just a random thing I noticed: I DO KNOW that it´s Asuka´s plugsuit, but aren´t they supposed to be skin tight? And IF they´re custom molded, what happened to Shinji´s crotch area? (He HAS a penis, that´s for sure. ; Comatose Asuka scene) I can hardly imagine custom molded plugsuits for kids that are still growing. Ow.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 02, 2010 12:03 pm If it looked the way it should have looked, it would have undermined the purpose of the joke. Cartoon is cartoon-like.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 02, 2010 12:07 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: If it looked the way it should have looked, it would have undermined the purpose of the joke.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari has a rack, apparently.             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Sep 02, 2010 12:12 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: And IF they´re custom molded, what happened to Shinji´s crotch area?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 02, 2010 12:27 pm Speaking of Shinji having a rack: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1263

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Sep 02, 2010 2:03 pm Years ago before I knew anything about the series, I honestly thought Shinji was a flat chested girl (I based this off of pictures.) It doesn't help that the one piece of audio I heard was him giving a rather feminine sounding "Ughh" in reply to Kaji in episode 8.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 02, 2010 2:14 pm DevRei17 wrote: Years ago before I knew anything about the series, I honestly thought Shinji was a ... girl

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 02, 2010 2:34 pm DevRei17 wrote: Years ago before I knew anything about the series, I honestly thought Shinji was a flat chested girl .

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 02, 2010 2:48 pm Is Shinji were a girl his name would be Rei............................ DUH!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 02, 2010 2:52 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Because Shinji is a male name, if he he were female her name would be Shinko or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Thu Sep 02, 2010 3:29 pm I always thought that the chest parts were molded plastic, like the male plugsuit's chest "armor".

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 02, 2010 3:32 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: If Shinji had been born a female his name would be Rei, not Shinko. It is stated in the show.

[]: Also, the Shinjiquarium pic is hawt. Just sayin'.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Sep 02, 2010 5:11 pm Hoshikawa-kun wrote: I always thought that the chest parts were molded plastic, like the male plugsuit's chest "armor".

[]: Re: Also, the Shinjiquarium pic is hawt. Just sayin'.             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Sep 02, 2010 5:13 pm Killer Bee wrote: I believe this is actually the case. When we see Rei pulling on her plug suit before the Ramiel fight(?), the upper body is stiff plastic and hangs in the air as she steps into the legs.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 02, 2010 5:23 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Because we already know that bit of backstory in episode one.

[]: Re: Also, the Shinjiquarium pic is hawt. Just sayin'.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 02, 2010 5:54 pm Allemann wrote: Ugh, this means those chests parts were intentionally ample looking.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 02, 2010 5:58 pm Gendo's a pervy pedobear. SIRP confirms this.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Sep 02, 2010 6:18 pm This is beginning to seem very much like the Shinjiko thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Thu Sep 02, 2010 6:57 pm I feel sorry for the kid, that plug suit must be a real ball buster. Just like the person the suit is tailored after. What really cracks me up is he's still wearing the damn thing after he leaves the carrier.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Sep 02, 2010 7:30 pm I never had any issue with Asuka's plug suit on Shinji, I had thought the breast area was just empty, kinda like air pockets in a vacuum form case as there are no breasts to fill the air hole. Since the suit is custom forming, it would have to have been made of some form of a latex polymer, and would allow it to stretch as the pilot ages, this would be the most cost effective measure for a long running Evangelion program, especially since the repair costs of an Eva are enough to bankrupt a nation (according to Seele).

And IF they´re custom molded, what happened to Shinji´s crotch area? (He HAS a penis, that´s for sure. ; Comatose Asuka scene) I can hardly imagine custom molded plugsuits for kids that are still growing. Ow.
